LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT SEKITEI CORPORATION'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DENIAL OF THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT RESULTED FROM FILING AN INADEQUATE AND UNSUPPORTED OPPOSITION NOT FROM FILING LATE, SO THE MISCALENDARING WAS NOT A CAUSE OF THE JUDGMENT AND THE FAILURE TO FILE AN ADEQUATE OPPOSITION IS NOT EXCUSABLE. IN ANY EVENT, DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN DILIGENCE IN MAKING THIS MOTION. THAT DEFENDANT IS LOCATED OUT OF STATE DOES NOT EXCUSE WAITING 4 MONTHS TO SEEK RELIEF IN AN UNLAWFUL DETAINER CASE, GIVEN THE LEGISLATIVE POLICY OF EXPEDITED PROCEDURES. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
